item_titles: Meta tests always-on AI glasses that capture your entire day
Meta Patents AI Device That Tracks Your Emotions, Watches You Take Your Meds
Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
clusters.summary: Meta新专利及测试中的“超级感知”AI眼镜因追踪情绪、健康数据及全天候录制引发隐私争议，公司试图增加安全措施以减少“令人毛骨悚然”的感觉。
clusters.title: Meta推进AI眼镜与设备战略并引发隐私担忧

item_titles: 同声传译一夜失业！GPT-Live瞬间翻译，老太太现场抬杠AI看傻全网
ChatGPT can now listen and talk at the same time, making AI conversations seem more human
OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
clusters.summary: OpenAI推出全新全双工语音模型，支持同时听说，大幅提升实时翻译的自然度，让同声传译体验发生质变。
clusters.title: OpenAI发布GPT-Live等新语音模型实现同声传译

item_titles: Public LLM benchmarks are mostly garbage
Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
clusters.summary: 分析指出包括SWE-Bench Pro在内的许多公开大语言模型基准测试存在严重缺陷，可能误导对AI模型实际能力的评估。
clusters.title: 业界质疑当前公开LLM与编码基准测试的可靠性

item_titles: Quoting Kenton Varda
Preventing LLM unit test spam
clusters.summary: 技术团队开始禁止使用AI生成PR提交信息和单元测试，认为这些内容低质量且毫无用处。
clusters.title: 开发者抵制AI生成的代码变更描述与单元测试

item_titles: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
Grok 4.5 is so cheap compared to Fable 5 and GPT 5.5 that benchmark gaps may not matter much
clusters.summary: 马斯克的xAI发布Grok 4.5大模型，号称达到Opus级性能，且在成本和token消耗上远低于GPT-5.5等竞品。
clusters.title: xAI发布Grok 4.5模型：性价比大幅提升

item_titles: Automating cross-repo documentation with GitHub Agentic Workflows
How GitHub Copilot enables zero DNS configuration for GitHub Pages
clusters.summary: GitHub展示利用Copilot和智能体工作流实现跨仓库文档自动审查及GitHub Pages零配置DNS部署。
clusters.title: GitHub推出智能体工作流以自动化文档与DNS配置
